# Krista Mashore Coaching

> Real estate marketing, lead generation, and personal branding for real estate agents and mortgage loan officers. From top 1% agent (19 consecutive years, 2,300+ homes sold) and top 1% coach Krista Mashore. Trademarked methodology: Community Market Leader.

Site map and full content of every published article:

- [Full content (all articles)](https://blog.kristamashore.com/llms-full.txt)
- [About Krista Mashore](https://blog.kristamashore.com/about)
- [Sitemap (XML)](https://blog.kristamashore.com/sitemap.xml)

## Real Estate Marketing

- [Real Estate Marketing pillar page](https://blog.kristamashore.com/real-estate-marketing)
- [One Video, Ten Placements: A Real Estate Distribution Playbook](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/one-video-ten-placements-real-estate) — You filmed a great video and posted it once. That's like cooking a five-course meal and serving the appetizer. This playbook shows you how to turn one video into ten pieces of content without extra filming.
- [Email Marketing for Real Estate Agents: The Highest-ROI Channel You're Not Using](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/email-marketing-real-estate-agents-2026) — You're posting on social media but ignoring the one channel that puts you directly in front of people who already want to hear from you. Email marketing is the highest-ROI channel for real estate agents. Here's how to use it.
- [The Social Media Content Calendar That Gets Real Estate Agents Leads, Not Just Likes](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/social-media-content-calendar-real-estate) — Random posting gets random results. This 5-category weekly content calendar gives real estate agents a repeatable system that generates leads, builds authority, and makes you the obvious choice in your market.
- [AI Virtual Staging for Real Estate: Stage Every Listing for a Fraction of the Cost](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/ai-virtual-staging-real-estate-listings) — Traditional staging costs thousands per property. AI virtual staging costs a fraction of that and delivers photorealistic results in minutes. Here's how top agents use it to market every listing like a luxury property.
- [How to Talk on Camera Without Sounding Scripted](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/talk-on-camera-real-estate) — Most agents avoid video because they feel awkward on camera. Here's the exact method to sound natural, build trust, and become the obvious choice in your market with every clip you post.
- [5 AI Prompts That Save Real Estate Agents Hours Every Week](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/ai-prompts-save-real-estate-agents-hours) — Five specific AI prompts that give real estate agents back hours every week on listing descriptions, follow-ups, social media, neighborhood guides, and video scripts.

## Real Estate Lead Generation

- [Real Estate Lead Generation pillar page](https://blog.kristamashore.com/real-estate-lead-generation)
- [Speed to Lead: Why the First Five Minutes Decide the Sale](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/speed-to-lead-real-estate) — You paid for that lead. Then you waited three hours to respond. By then, two other agents had already made contact. Speed to lead isn't a nice-to-have. It's the system that decides whether your ad spend turns into appointments or wasted money.
- [Referral Systems That Scale for Real Estate Agents](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/referral-systems-real-estate) — You get referrals sometimes. But sometimes is not a system. Here's how to build a referral engine that generates predictable business through visibility, remarkable experiences, and strategic touchpoints.
- [Past Client Lead Generation: The 100-Door Strategy That Fills Your Pipeline](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/past-client-lead-generation) — Your past clients already trust you. They already had a great experience. The 100-Door Strategy turns your existing database into a predictable pipeline of referrals and repeat business without a single cold call.
- [Google Business Profile for Real Estate Agents: The Free Lead Machine You're Ignoring](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/google-business-profile-real-estate-agents) — When someone searches 'real estate agent near me,' do you show up? Your Google Business Profile is free, takes an hour to set up, and works for you around the clock. Here's how to claim your spot in the local pack.
- [The Referral System That Replaces Cold Calling](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/referral-system-replaces-cold-calling) — Stop chasing cold leads. This referral system gives real estate agents predictable, high-quality leads from people who already trust you.

## Personal Branding & Authority

- [Personal Branding & Authority pillar page](https://blog.kristamashore.com/personal-branding-authority)
- [When to Post, Where to Post, How Often: A Real Estate Content Schedule](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/when-where-how-often-post-real-estate) — Everyone says be consistent on social media. Nobody tells you when, where, or how often. This content schedule gives real estate agents a clear framework for showing up on the right platforms at the right times.
- [The Differentiation Audit: What Makes You Different From Every Other Agent](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/differentiation-audit-real-estate) — If a seller asks why they should hire you over the agent down the street, can you answer clearly? The Differentiation Audit helps you find, articulate, and prove your unique value proposition so you stop competing on personality and price.
- [AI Listing Videos That Prove You're Not a Commodity](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/ai-listing-videos-not-a-commodity) — AI listing videos show sellers you're a digital marketing expert who happens to sell homes. Here's how to build a pre-listing video package that wins listings before you walk through the door.
- [Win Before You Arrive: The Pre-Listing Authority Playbook](https://blog.kristamashore.com/articles/win-before-you-arrive-pre-listing-authority) — Win before you arrive. The 5 moves top agents make before the listing appointment so the seller picks them before they walk in the door.
